programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Summit
programme.desc: Ben Shephard presents a series where 14 ordinary Brits set off to climb one of New Zealands highest peaks to win a share of 200,000 pounds - with their progress tracked by the menacing Mountains Keeper, they have just 14 days to make the 100-kilometre journey across treacherous terrain and perilous crossings. However, not everyone can make it to The Summit as the group face vote-offs at each base camp along the way...

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: A daily delivery of bespoke Mindfulness content designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Ant and Decs Limitless Win
programme.desc: Contestants answer questions in a bid to win as much money as they can, with no limit to the amount of money they can have in the pot, but if they get the answer over by just one, they could lose thousands of already banked cash.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: The hit daytime format returns with a celebrity version - hosted by the inimitable Emmy Award-winning US entertainer RuPaul Charles, Celebrity Lingo sees famous faces pair up and go head-to-head in the fast-paced wordplay game as they vie to fill in the blanks and find the missing words. The celebrity teams will be playing for big money for their chosen charities up against the clock and their opponents.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.sub-title: A Touch of Stately in Somerset
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and team show you how to take inspiration from the grand gardens of the nations grand stately homes to create a beautiful design that works for a traditional domestic garden. To prove it, Alan, Frances Tophill and David Domoney makeover the garden of Mel, a Dementia Ward manager working at a Royal British Legion care home.

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan at the barn this time are Greta Scacchi and Ardal OHanlon to provide the chat - horticulturalist Ashley Edwards celebrates everything thats great about the orchid, we shine a spotlight on the special bond between sheepdogs and farmers, and its the return of the prestigious Wine and Fizzy Tipples Awards (WAFTAs).

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: James Martins Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James Martins weekend show is our pleasure, but as the guvnor moves back into his old TV manor, we find him in his own home relaxed, refreshed, invigorated and raring to do the things he does best from the comfort of his own home - James extends the invitation to both guests and viewers, bringing all into his world for a warm, intimate, funny, entertaining and delicious programme.

programme.title: Ainsleys Taste of the Bahamas
programme.desc: Join chef Ainsley Harriott as he immerses himself in the food, culture and people of the Bahamas while offering an authentic look at Bahamian life and flavour - in this episode, Ainsley tries his hand at straw-weaving before learning how to cook grouper Nassau-style, taking in a lesson in conch-servation down at the Fish Fry, and following that up with rum punch chicken wings in his kitchen on the beach.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: ITV Racing Live LIVE
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of racing from Kelso, Doncaster and Newbury - the feature meeting is at Kelso, where the Scottish Borders track stages its richest race day and the Morebattle Hurdle offers a bonus for any horse that wins that race and goes on to win at the Cheltenham Festival, a double last completed by The Shunter, and there is also competitive racing from Newbury and Doncaster.

programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world. Followed by a national weather forecast.

Elsewhere, upcycling supremo Max McMurdo turns old wooden pallets into a garden potting bench, and we learn how to make a lavender gin sour cocktail.

programme.title: Fletchers Family Farm
programme.desc: Documentary series. After a year without pigs, Liz and Kelvin decide to reintroduce them to the family farm - they have chosen a crossbreed of Oxford Sandy and Blacks and Saddlebacks for this occasion, and the children are thrilled with the new sow and her 12 piglets. Also arriving on the farm is a new range of blankets by Liz that are made from the wool sheared from their flock in the summer - to help sell the new stock, Liz and Kelvin start hatching a plan to host their first farmers market.

programme.title: Julia Bradburys Wonders of the Frozen South
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury journeys to the edge of the world to experience the beauty and brutal conditions of Antarctica as she explores its icy landscapes and extraordinary wildlife - after crossing the Southern Ocean, Julia navigates through thick and jagged brash ice in bays framed by snow-covered peaks. On a whale-spotting mission, penguins and seals surround Julias boat before a pod of humpback whales finally breaks cover to breath and feed in the bay.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news in London and the South East, plus local weather.

programme.title: The Floor
programme.desc: Rob Brydon leads a thrilling semi-final as the last 17 contestants face their toughest duels yet - every square, question and second counts while a 5,000-pound Floor Bonus is still up for grabs and so is a spot in the 50,000-pound finale.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Six contestants vie for the chance of answering 15 questions to win a million pounds. Four lifelines - Phone a Friend, 50:50, Ask the Audience and Ask the Host - can help them along the way.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: Jane believes that marriage with boyfriend Tommy is just around the corner, but cracks soon appear in the relationship and a toxic pattern starts to emerge. Now living together, Jane and Tommy try to integrate into each others social circles - however, some of their friends are disapproving of the relationship. Confronted with the sudden appearance of a ghost from her past at a party, Jane starts to unravel and her relationship with Tommy hangs in the balance.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Real Unforgotten
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part series following detectives as they reinvestigate the murder of Carol Morgan in the storeroom of her Bedfordshire corner shop in 1991 - a beloved local figure and mother of two young children, the murder had haunted the community ever since.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Every midsummer, the inhabitants of a tiny Cornish village perform a disturbing ritual which ends with an effigy strapped to a burning wheel that plunges off the Cornish cliffs into the ocean below - but was it a man of straw or the body of local undertaker, Jonathan Riddle, who has mysteriously disappeared?

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Elderly Lily Armitage ventures into the ramshackle farm to visit her bedridden friend, Agnes. She does indeed find her - dead and locked in the freezer. Meanwhile, a mentally-challenged man disappears and pregnant teenager, Hilda Clemo, vanishes from her Cornish village. As fears for her safety grow, Wycliffe is brought in to search the fields and cliffs and question the family.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When Lewis and Hathaway are called in to investigate the murder of a rising star on the Oxford theatrical circuit, they focus their suspicions on the cast of his current play. The victim is found with a planted note quoting Shakespeare. As Lewis discovers all the theatrical ambitions and jealousies, he wonders if an actor would kill for a good part. Meanwhile, Hathaway thinks he may have uncovered just who killed Lewiss wife.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.sub-title: The Mirror Crackd From Side to Side
programme.desc: Hollywood movie star Marina Gregg takes up residence in St Mary Mead with her film director husband. The glamorous couple throws a party, but things get ugly when a fan in attendance ends up dead from a poisoned cocktail. Can Marple solve the mystery?

programme.title: Agatha Christies Poirot
programme.desc: Eccentric millionaire Benedict Farley tells Poirot that he has repeatedly dreamed of killing himself, but when he is later found dead, Poirot suspects murder by hypnosis.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: While Laura and Rosemary are in Baffington village restoring the churchyard to its former glory for a medieval fair, they find themselves caught up in a murder mystery involving a fight over land and love.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Sergeant Dan Scott arrives to work with Barnaby and is thrown straight into a murder investigation in Midsomer Mallow. A noise heard near the scene of Fiona Thompsons bloodstained body leads police to suspect an odd-job man, but when the murder toll rises, Barnaby becomes concerned for Cully, who is organising a ten-year school reunion.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Womanising landowner Gareth Heldman is killed by a violent blow from a Celtic spear, reawakening memories of a tragic archaeological dig at the ancient mound of Midsomer Barrow.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a prize-winning author is murdered on the eve of a literary festival, Barnaby and Scott discover a hotbed of corruption, scandal and financial mismanagement in the community of Midsomer St Michael. Before they can discover who is telling the truth, the death toll begins to rise.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a young barman from The Maid in Splendour pub is found shot dead, Barnaby and Scott uncover a web of romantic intrigue involving several members of the bar staff.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited

programme.title: Cadfael

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: Discover how the finest crystal glasses are hand blown, from globs of red-hot molten glass. See how malt vinegar is brewed, thanks to the efforts of billions of bacteria - all carefully nurtured for the job. Go behind the scenes at Aga and see how their iconic country-kitchen stoves are made to last a lifetime. And meet the team at Britains last remaining tennis ball factory. They turn chunks of raw rubber into custom-made balls to grace tennis courts around the world.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch
programme.desc: The team resumes drilling into the Energy Zone. Duane takes a stand against the poachers and Charlie finds a dead animal with unusual bite marks on it.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The boys are in Hay on Wye and Bedford, where Henry lovingly restores a bespoke workbench and Simon ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon restores an enamel roll top bath and builds a kids den out of old doors. Meanwhile, Henry makes a wall mounted safe from a jerry can and lovingly restores a cheese making trough.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell are antique hunting in Cumbria. They sally forth from Cockermouth and point their 1960s classic car towards an auction near Kendal. Phil visits a boatyard for an unlikely purchase before heading deep underground for a history lesson.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Expert Steph Connell has a big surprise for Phil Serrell on his birthday as they continue their adventure. Setting off from Dumfries and Galloway they head to an auction showdown in Edinburgh. Phil skips an antique shop to visit a book shop and leaves with a novel buy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steph becomes puppet master as she tours the Scottish Borders in pursuit of profits but Phil is distracted by the local cuisine. At the end of the first days shopping all hes bought is some lunch.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil finds his sea legs with a spot of sailing in the Firth of Clyde whilst Steph tries her hand at weaving tartan on a traditional Renfrewshire loom. A visit to a salvage emporium means Phil is in his element as he discovers a cabinet that once displayed one of the worlds most expensive books.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its Steph Connell and Phil Serrells final adventure and theyre crossing three counties in pursuit of north east Englands most profitable antiques. With Steph playing catch up, Phil makes the most expensive purchase of his trip.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First to arrive is Marcia Bryan, with a precious doll for the attention of toy restorers Julie and Amanda. This dislocated doll serves as a reminder of Marcias time in a childrens home in the 1950s, where she lived with her twin brother from the age of six weeks. As a little girl, Marcia bonded with Diana the Doll as they shared the same skin colour.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Art conservator Lucia Scalisi revives an oil painting of a mining scene, created by an amateur artist in the 1960s. It is a delicate task for Lucia as she cleans away the dirty surface to reveal the stunning scene underneath. Owner Gwyn is overwhelmed when she returns to the barn to see her miner fathers artwork restored to its full glory.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First up is a pinball penny slot machine, originally at the bar of a village pub run by owner Jeannines family. From the late 1930s until the 1950s, her great-grandfather was the landlord at this local watering hole, and was then succeeded by her grandparents. Jeannine was brought up just opposite the pub, and this antique pinball machine now provides a tangible link to her predecessors.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus is in Sutton Coldfield to look through a life-long collection. He uncovers Beatles memorabilia and two programmes from Englands 1966 World Cup win.

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Peter Mason from Herefordshire has brought in a kitchen curiosity from a bygone age. The old-fashioned ice cream maker belonged to his beloved Granny Ethel and holds memories of happy times at her house. The gadget is falling apart, so Peter hopes metal craftsman Dominic Chinea can salvage it. Lots of fun is had when organ restorer David Burville takes on a Spanish barrel organ.

programme.title: The Repair Shop

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell are antique hunting in Cumbria. They sally forth from Cockermouth and point their 1960s classic car towards an auction near Kendal. Phil visits a boatyard for an unlikely purchase before heading deep underground for a history lesson.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Expert Steph Connell has a big surprise for Phil Serrell on his birthday as they continue their adventure. Setting off from Dumfries and Galloway they head to an auction showdown in Edinburgh. Phil skips an antique shop to visit a book shop and leaves with a novel buy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Steph becomes puppet master as she tours the Scottish Borders in pursuit of profits but Phil is distracted by the local cuisine. At the end of the first days shopping all hes bought is some lunch.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Its Steph Connell and Phil Serrells final adventure and theyre crossing three counties in pursuit of north east Englands most profitable antiques. With Steph playing catch up, Phil makes the most expensive purchase of his trip.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First to arrive is Marcia Bryan, with a precious doll for the attention of toy restorers Julie and Amanda. This dislocated doll serves as a reminder of Marcias time in a childrens home in the 1950s, where she lived with her twin brother from the age of six weeks. As a little girl, Marcia bonded with Diana the Doll as they shared the same skin colour.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Art conservator Lucia Scalisi revives an oil painting of a mining scene, created by an amateur artist in the 1960s. It is a delicate task for Lucia as she cleans away the dirty surface to reveal the stunning scene underneath. Owner Gwyn is overwhelmed when she returns to the barn to see her miner fathers artwork restored to its full glory.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: First up is a pinball penny slot machine, originally at the bar of a village pub run by owner Jeannines family. From the late 1930s until the 1950s, her great-grandfather was the landlord at this local watering hole, and was then succeeded by her grandparents. Jeannine was brought up just opposite the pub, and this antique pinball machine now provides a tangible link to her predecessors.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House

programme.title: The Sugar Wars: The Life Story of Angelo Lonardo
programme.desc: Angelo Lonardo grew up in the wealthy neighborhood of Shaker Heights, his father was a powerful man and the first Mafia Boss of the city. After his father was murdered by a member of the rival Porello crime family in 1929.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns
programme.desc: The FBI steps in to catch a sadistic criminal who coerces his victims to rob a bank, with the lives of their family members hanging in the balance.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns
programme.desc: The FBI partners with a local detective and an ex-cop informant to apprehend a violent fugitive targeting banks in southern New Jersey.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns
programme.desc: A special FBI task force meets with a code of silence in a tough Boston neighbourhood as they track a deadly crew of professional robbers.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard OMahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have somewhat unwittingly surrounded themselves by criminals, including Phil Berriman.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: When innocent people are jailed for crimes they did not commit, what effect does it have on their lives and their loved ones? Bernard OMahoney finds out.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran Londons East End.

programme.title: Gangster No. 1: The Freddie Foreman Story
programme.desc: Attached to almost every unsolved gangland murder in London over the last 50 years, Freddie Foreman is the `Godfather of Britains criminal underworld. Foreman reveals the audacious details of the heists, double crossings, shootouts, murders and betrayals he was involved in, and ultimately, what has made him `Gangster Number.1.

programme.title: True Crime Scene
programme.desc: Based on a true story, fugitive Sam Sheppard is found guilty of killing his wife despite his pleas of innocence.

programme.title: True Crime Scene
programme.desc: A body is hauled out of the English Channel, however it is still very much alive and raising a family.

programme.title: True Crime Scene
programme.desc: A highly regarded officer is suspected in the disappearance of several soldiers.

programme.title: True Crime Scene
programme.desc: A mother of two is charged after placing a 911 call stating her two sons have been stabbed by an intruder.

programme.title: True Crime Scene
programme.desc: Woman found dead and her husband who was drunk that evening confesses to her murder but none of the evidence points to him.

programme.title: True Crime Scene
programme.desc: Ted Binion at the Las Vegas casino tells his lawyer to remove his girlfriends Sandys name from his the will if she doesnt kill him tonight.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Peter Manuel was a Scottish serial killer who killed at least eight people between 1956 and 1958.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Dramatised account of 19th-century serial killer Mary Ann Cotton, aka the Black Widow, who travelled around north-east England and murdered men for their life insurance.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: The case of Dr Ruxton, a physician who lived a quiet, respectable life in Lancaster, until in 1935 he beat, strangled and stabbed his wife and housemaid to death.

programme.title: Aileen: Life and Death of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: This feature-length film examines Aileens harrowing life, tracing her story from the freezing woods of Michigan to the steamy swamps of Florida, and features her closest friends, her lawyers and even her estranged birth mother. At the heart of the film are the astonishing, unique, troubled interviews Broomfield filmed with Wuornos in prison, including her last, defiant words before execution.

programme.title: The Murder Network: A Serial Killer in Nazi Paris
programme.desc: In France, 1942, a serial killer stalks the streets of occupied Paris. Using the chaos of the war to his own advantage, psychotic doctor Marcel Petiot poses as a resistance operative and preys on those fleeing the nazis.

programme.title: Life on Fire
programme.desc: The series that takes us inside volcanoes. This episode tells the story, spread over millions of years, of volcanic activity in the tropical Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Life on Fire
programme.desc: Jeremy Irons narrates the earth-shatering series. Almost 2,000 years ago, a volcanic eruption forced the Sockeye Salmon to flee its native North American river.

programme.title: Cuttlefish - The Brainy Bunch
programme.desc: Cuttlefish, with 3 hearts and 10 arms, reveal brain secrets through their eyes and pyrotechnics.

programme.title: Lionfish: The New Pirates of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Armed with 18 venomous spines, the lionfish hunts, invisible to its prey, in packs. Shedding light on the fascinating behaviour that let the lionfish conquer foreign waters, and by doing so threaten entire ecosystems.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti, facing enormous challenges. Lions are quick to throw their muscle around, and hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manages to kill.

programme.title: Antarctica Dreaming: Wildlife on Ice
programme.desc: Antarctica Dreaming documents all major Antarctic and sub-Antarctic animals.

programme.title: Killer Whales Up Close and Personal

programme.title: Giants With Mud Feet
programme.desc: Scientists race against time to save the elm tree from a fungal disease.

programme.title: Wild Faces of Switzerland
programme.desc: Getting to know a comparatively unknown corner of Switzerland, the Jura region. The film is a journey of discovery into almost untouched nature in the change of the seasons. The Jura Mountains are the little brother of the Alps.

programme.title: Wild Faces of Switzerland
programme.desc: Graubunden in winter means lots of fun on the slopes. In nature, however, there is a struggle for survival because of the cold. The film tells astonishing stories from the wintry nature of Graubunden and shows magnificent landscape shots.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The natural beauty of the shifting sand dunes of the Curonian Spit, the romantic beaches of the Latvian Baltic Sea and the island worlds of Estonia.

programme.title: Wild Baltic

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators

programme.desc: A journey of discovery in Scandinavias wild forests. Together with three brown bear cubs, visiting the home of the mighty moose and cunning wolves, rare forest reindeer and flying squirrels.

programme.title: Band of Bears
programme.desc: For months, the bear cubs remain close to their mother and are warmed and suckled, before the triplets begin to discover their world outside of the cave.

programme.desc: Exploring central Italys ancient volcanoes that mutter away underground despite being dormant.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Living with Volcanoes

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: Sarah Moore is scouring the recycling centre in Witley for unwanted items she can breathe new life into. programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: At Witley Recycling Centre, upcycler extraordinaire Sarah Moore is on the lookout for three unloved items she can save and sell on for a profit. Designer Sarah Peterson attempts to give an old table a new lease of life, while clockmaker Paul Parry has an interesting challenge on his hands with a redundant record player. For his own project, Jay has a farmhouse chair to overhaul, but will he succeed in finding new homes for all three upcycled items?

programme.title: AC/DC: Live at Donington
programme.desc: Filmed coverage of legendary Australian band AC/DCs third headlining show at the `Monsters of Rock festival in Castle Donington, UK.

programme.title: Deep Purple Perfect Strangers
programme.desc: The bands most commercially successful line-up featuring Ritchie Blackmore, Ian Gillan, Roger Glover, Jon Lord and Ian Paice reunite in 1984 for an electrifying concert in Melbourne.

programme.title: Super Duper Alice Cooper
programme.desc: Rare archival footage, animation and interviews illustrate the story of how Vincent Furnier, a preachers son, became rock icon Alice Cooper.

programme.title: Super Duper Alice Cooper
programme.desc: Rare archival footage, animation and interviews illustrate the story of how Vincent Furnier, a preachers son, became rock icon Alice Cooper.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of the Jurassic World theme park, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing return to the island of Isla Nublar to save the remaining dinosaurs from a volcano thats about to erupt. They soon encounter terrifying new breeds of gigantic dinosaurs, while uncovering a conspiracy that threatens the entire planet.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the parks security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: Dr Alan Grant reluctantly accompanies a rich couple who are searching for their teenage son who crashed on the second Jurassic Park island while paragliding. Unfortunately for the adventurers, there are many unfamiliar - and deadly - dinosaurs lurking in the jungle.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: Justice League Vs. Bizarro League
programme.desc: Superman, Batman and the rest of the Justice League team up with the Bizarro League to defeat Darkseid.

programme.title: Straight Outta Nowhere: Scooby-Doo Meets Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and the Gang find themselves in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, the backwoods hometown of Courage and his owners, Muriel and Eustace Bagge.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula, who operates a high-end resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the counts teen-aged daughter.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody and Sherman
programme.desc: Mr. Peabody, the most accomplished canine in the world, and his boy, Sherman, use a time machine called the Wabac to embark on outrageous adventures. However, when Sherman takes the Wabac without permission to impress his friend Penny, he accidentally rips a hole in the universe and causes havoc with world history. Its up to Mr. Peabody to mount a rescue and prevent the past, present and future from being permanently altered. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A life-saving surgery fuses together a police officer and his faithful police dog -- and Dog Man is born. Learning to embrace his new identity, Dog Man must stop feline supervillain Petey the Cat from cloning himself and going on a crime spree.

programme.title: Monsters vs Aliens
programme.desc: When an evil alien attacks the Earth, a motley crew of monsters is called into action to save the world from imminent destruction. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: Scary Girl
programme.desc: To save her father from a dangerous scientist in a world shrouded in darkness, and prevent her planets destruction, a young girl overcomes her fears to travel to a mysterious city of light.

programme.title: Straight Outta Nowhere: Scooby-Doo Meets Courage the Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Scooby-Doo and the Gang find themselves in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, the backwoods hometown of Courage and his owners, Muriel and Eustace Bagge.

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: Briar and Bramble lose their mother at a very young age under mysterious circumstances. Many years later, logger Vick takes the bears to visit the Robot Research Institute, and they uncover a clue relating to their mother.

programme.title: The Inseparables
programme.desc: A runaway puppet with an overactive imagination and an abandoned stuffed animal in need of a friend meet in Central Park and join forces to try and find a home for the both of them.

programme.title: The Inseparables
programme.desc: A runaway puppet with an overactive imagination and an abandoned stuffed animal in need of a friend meet in Central Park and join forces to try and find a home for the both of them.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Two childhood friends get caught up in with the mob in New York and find themselves forced to travel to Australia to deliver $50,000. Their trouble really starts when they reach the outback, and a kangaroo bounds away with the cash.

programme.title: Jackass: The Movie
programme.desc: Johnny Knoxville and his mad companions leap onto the big screen. Expect the usual mad gross-out japes, from making snow cones out of urine to using the display toilets in bathroom outlets, and from racing golf carts over hallowed greens to tightrope walking over alligators.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: 13 Going on 30
programme.desc: Jenna is desperate for acceptance at school. After wishing that she was older, she wakes up with a job, a flat and a boyfriend, but is being 30 all its cracked up to be? Jenna discovers she isnt the person she thought shed be when she grew up.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing hes an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: The Terminal
programme.desc: Eastern European visitor Viktor arrives in New York only to find that his papers are no longer valid. Rules being rules, airport chief Dixon cant let Viktor into America, or let him leave. Viktor has to survive by his wits, and slowly becomes the darling of the airport, as his sweet nature charms all who work there - except Dixon.

programme.title: Its Complicated
programme.desc: When attending their sons college graduation, a couple reignite the spark in their relationship. However, the complication lies in the fact that they are divorced and he has remarried.

programme.title: Its Complicated
programme.desc: When attending their sons college graduation, a couple reignite the spark in their relationship. However, the complication lies in the fact that they are divorced and he has remarried.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Goring.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Based on the true story of an unsophisticated single mother who stumbles upon an environmental cover-up. While working for a lawyer, she is puzzled by an old case and decides to do some research of her own. She discovers that a chemical company knowingly polluted the local area, and with the help of the lawyer launches a class action to sue the company for damages.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: Dunkirk
programme.desc: Germany advances into France, trapping Allied troops on the beaches of Dunkirk. Under air and ground cover from British and French forces, troops are slowly and methodically evacuated from the beach using every vessel that can be found.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lovers sex-change operation.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Danny is given a magic ticket by a strange projectionist and is transported into the cinema screen. Thanks to his advance knowledge of the plot, he is able to help his silver-screen hero out of an awkward situation and becomes his partner. Theres trouble in store for the unlikely duo when the villain tries to seize the magic ticket.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batmans fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Batman and Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duos only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: In an England of the future, Alex de Large is the leader of a gang of droogs whose pastime is violence, sex and murder, but whose eventual punishment is almost as extreme and violent as his crimes. Betrayed by the other members of his gang, he is arrested and offered an experimental treatment in order to shorten his sentence.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Supernatural comedy about three New York parapsychology professors who decide to set up a ghost-catching agency. Soon a storm of malevolent spirits threatens to destroy the city, and the mysterious contents of a womans fridge suggest a paranormal Armageddon.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The phantom-fighters return to the streets of New York when they come to the aid of a woman who fears that her baby is the target of ghostly forces. Four years after Dr Peter Venkman broke up with Dana Barrett, she appeals for help to save her son when an arch-demon trapped in an oil painting wants to take over his body. The old team reunite and trace the source of the trouble to a sinister underground river of slime.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York.

programme.title: One More Shot
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, Minnie discovers a bottle of tequila that allows her to travel through time, each shot taking her back to the start of the night, giving her the chance to alter the course of her millennium.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: Believing he witnessed an abduction, a young man turns to his next-door neighbour, a retired security guard, to help him find the missing woman.

programme.desc: Skilled operatives travel to an island research facility to secure life-saving DNA from dinosaurs. As the top-secret mission becomes more and more dangerous, they soon make a sinister, shocking discovery thats been hidden from the world for decades.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When five friends cause a deadly car accident, they cover up their involvement and keep it a secret rather than face the consequences. One year later, they find themselves stalked by a mysterious killer who knows what they did last summer.

programme.title: M3GAN 2.0
programme.desc: A military-grade robotic weapon known as Amelia becomes increasingly self-aware and dangerous to the human race. Hoping to stop it, Gemma, an advocate for oversight of AI, decides to resurrect M3GAN, making it faster, stronger, and more lethal.

programme.desc: A brother and sister witness a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: Bone Lake
programme.desc: Forced to share a mansion with a mysterious and attractive couple, Diego and Sages dream getaway soon spirals into a nightmarish maze of sex, lies and manipulation as terrifying secrets come to light, triggering a bloody battle for survival.

programme.desc: Fearless: In the land down under, each moment is a battle for survival. To see another day, animals must be bold, courageous and totally fearless.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Tenacious: Wallabies bravely scale the terrain and Turkey Dads defend their nests. They prove that having a tenacious attitude is the key to overcoming the odds.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: Hotspots: The Last Hope
programme.desc: Home to hundreds of species of animals, plants and fauna, Borneos biodiversity is dizzying, and every year even more species are discovered here.

programme.title: Hotspots: The Last Hope
programme.desc: Discover one of Australias most diverse hotspots, home to a wide variety of birds and kangaroo species, even tree-kangaroos and kangaroo rats.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab
programme.desc: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab chronicles the journey of a small community of Hermit crabs in Guadeloupe.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough charts the story of animals who defy gravity, starting with the planets first flyers: the insect.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: After meeting some critters who glide through life in Borneo, Sir David Attenborough decides to turn back the clock.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: In the final episode in the series, Sir David Attenborough turns his attention to the creatures that dominate our skies today.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Dodge the swords, spines and deadly ornaments on these alpha hunters. Observe moose and their impressive horns, storks with sabre-like beaks and rhinos that scare the competition with their huge horns.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Go scavenging with natures clean-up crew, as Tasmanian devils get into food fights with rivals, dung beetles roll over the competition and more.

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: Travelling to the ends of Australias shark highways to discover if Greenly Island is a truck stop for migrating great whites. Plus, a search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Dodge the swords, spines and deadly ornaments on these alpha hunters. Observe moose and their impressive horns, storks with sabre-like beaks and rhinos that scare the competition with their huge horns.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Go scavenging with natures clean-up crew, as Tasmanian devils get into food fights with rivals, dung beetles roll over the competition and more.

programme.title: Super Shark Highway
programme.desc: Travelling to the ends of Australias shark highways to discover if Greenly Island is a truck stop for migrating great whites. Plus, a search for proof of a genetic connection between northern bull sharks and their cooler-climate cousins.

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee introduces us to the incredible animals living in one of the worlds toughest places, deserts.

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Ayree examines the rainforest residents that have pushed their bodies to the limit, revealing some of the worlds most remarkable behaviours and adaptations.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: The Addo Elephant Park was founded in 1931 and is 1,640km2. It hosts more than 450 elephants and other mammals and was created in response to the elephant population falling as low as eleven.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: Table Mountain National Park on the southwestern tip of Africa surrounded by ocean and humanity. It is a rugged peninsula jutting out into the cold Atlantic Ocean and forming an island of incredible diversity.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbirds mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crabs traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmons uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: A look at the abilities that give some animals an edge in life, including fireflies flashes, the tarsiers night vision, the mantis shrimps knockout punch, and the saltwater crocs prey-detecting pressure sensors.

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: Meeting natures most wanted to see why some species dont get the respect they deserve, including the great white sharks electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Follow the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of little penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighbourhoods in nature.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: The Emu is Australias biggest native bird and is the second largest bird in the world after the African ostrich, two metres tall, with an almost three metre running stride and totally flightless.

programme.title: Africas Wild Roommates -- How Animals Share Bed and Board
programme.desc: An exploration of the joys and sorrows of living together, following a range of different animals in Africa that live together in communities.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: 13 Hours to Survive
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: Wild Battleground
programme.desc: Discover how different animals use the terrain to their advantage and their unique attributes to defeat their opponents at each location, becoming masters of communication, camouflage, diplomacy and combat.

programme.title: Untamed Valley
programme.desc: Bustling with wildlife, a grassland lies at the heart of Zambias Luangwa Valley known to locals as the Ebony Plain. Its a busy little neighbourhood and home to a family of warthogs, baboons and a solitary female leopard named Olimba.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the stories behind remarkable friendships that have formed between humans and some of the most unlikely animal companions, from a bull that plays football to a mouse family living in an English garden.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Playful: The animals of Australia work hard to ensure survival. Sometimes working hard isnt always smart. A playful approach can be just as important.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Sinister: Australia has a reputation for the most sinister animals on earth. Behind each sinister trait lies a clever means of survival.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal the story of the vertebrates, from their humble origins as the primitive fish that once swam in ancient seas, to their radical move onto land and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal how mammals developed from tiny forest dwellers to become the dominant life form on the planet.

programme.title: Kui Buri: Thailands Hidden Eden
programme.desc: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

programme.title: In for the Kill
programme.desc: Natural predators use camouflaged markings and hidden tunnels to pull off feats of speed, cunning and agility in their hunts.

programme.title: My Best Friends An Animal

programme.title: Surviving the Amazon
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the river, a snake makes a killer move and a stealth tarantula waits to strike. Nothing is safe when the Amazons predators are on the prowl.

programme.title: Surviving the Amazon
programme.desc: Meet monkeys who like monogamy, a bird who rivals Casanova and a spider wholl risk his life for love. A look at how hard it is to find the one in the jungle.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team investigate what looks like a haunted house, and discover a terrifying creature that can camouflage itself to any background. The creature may hold the key to a years-old unsolved murder case, and the team find themselves forced to work with an interfering police officer who has personal reasons for getting involved.

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team are divided by two different threats - one from the past and one from the future. Cutter, Connor, Abby and Becker must return the sweet-looking but dangerous diictodons to the Permian era while dodging journalist Mick Harper, who is determined to expose the ARC and its secrets. Meanwhile, the others face an attack from Helen and her Cleaner Replicas.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Bodelwyddan Castle in Denbighshire. Amongst the fine art and antiquities, the `Most Haunted team discover that some former residents of this plush abode would rather not leave. After the warm Welsh welcome, prepare for a series of spine chilling events and things that go bump in the night.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate Annesley Hall. From style and splendour to danger and desolation - the `Most Haunted team are horrified by the sinister secrets that this manor house still harbours, having encountered both benevolent and belligerent spiritual entities. Their investigation culminates in an amazing phenomenon.

programme.title: Anand Ashram
programme.desc: Dr Deepak lives with his wealthy father, a Thakur, in a small town in India. While the Thakur would like to get Deepak to marry a woman from an equally wealthy family, he has fallen in love with a poor woman named Asha.

programme.title: Akayla
programme.desc: When inspector Vijay meets club dancer Sapna, he falls in love with her and wants them to get married, but he has to gain permission from a gangster.

programme.title: Haathkadi
programme.desc: An inspector hires four juveniles to kidnap a politician as he wants to usurp the ministers property. The juveniles have other plans for the politician, who was responsible for them going to jail.

programme.title: Apne Paraye
programme.desc: Chander and his family are forced to leave his cousins home, where he has been living while trying to find a job, when an influential advocate moves in. Soon, the advocate claims that Chander and his wife owe him money and have been stealing from him, and takes the matter to court.

programme.title: Shaan
programme.desc: Hardworking Police Officer Shiv Kumar lives with his wife, his son, and two wayward brothers. When he is killed, Ravi and Vijay renounce their waywardness to find their brothers killer, to avenge his death.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Seeta is a wealthy but timid girl who is exploited by her family members, while Geeta is just he opposite.

programme.title: Aankhen

programme.desc: Poor James May. Stuck between his older and younger sisters, Jane and Sarah, his only toys were their hand-me-downs. programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King explore our national love of picnics. With their unique banter and camaraderie, the duo create their ultimate al fresco lunch at Beaufort Polo Club; find out how our summer obsession evolved; celebrate picnic classics such as the cornish pasty and the scotch egg; bake a luxurious Dundee cake, and make a country terrine that would play centre stage in any outdoor feast.

programme.title: Rick Steins Spain

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Clarkson reviews the Nissan GT-R and tests it out on the Fuji Speedway and James takes a look at the Renault Megane Coupe Concept. Two classic limousines are compared; Clarksons 1969 Grosser Mercedes-Benz and Mays 1972 Rolls Royce Corniche Coupe. Judges from `Dragons Den Peter Jones and Theo Paphetis are the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James take on their rivals from the German equivalent of `Top Gear and, in doing so, face their toughest challenge yet - not mentioning the war. programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel drive over 2000km of Ethiopias bone shaking roads in a quest to reach Aksum, known as the home of the Ark of the Covenant. Along the way they have to compete with truck drivers high on local drug khat, a calamitous breakdown and a shortage of fuel in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Angus Deayton and Mariella Frostrup drive up Madagascars eastern coast during the tail end of the rainy season. This is a route with countless river crossings, offering Angus and Mariella a terrifying array of broken bridges and flimsy ferries as their only way across. The roads themselves are mired with thick mud, making progress increasingly painful and even forcing the pair to spend a night the car.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey finds herself attracted to another man for the first time since her husband went to prison and invites the handsome soccer star around for a romantic dinner-a-deux.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Traceys first Christmas without Darryl looks bleak, but will something in the post brighten her mood?

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: With their husbands still in prison, Sharon and Tracey turn to their man-hungry neighbour Dorien for help when their central heating breaks down.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lovejoy overhears a row at a society wedding between the groom and the grooms father-in-law, a rich landowner. That night Lovejoy discovers the newly-married man has been murdered, but nobody believes him.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lovejoy smells a rat when he meets a property developer who wants to go into business with Lady Janes husband.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Lovejoy plans an elaborate sting which begins when he discovers that an American widow and a Japanese businessman have been swindled of nearly £2 million by an unscrupulous antiques dealer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown struggles to save Sid from himself when he vows vengeance on his former defence barrister.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS reinvestigate the disappearance of five-year-old Yasser Blackledge 25 years ago when a recently released prisoner, John Davies, confesses to his abduction and murder. The team are suspicious of Davies motives for the admission so soon after being granted parole, and far from treating it as an open and shut case they decide to take a closer look at Yassers estranged parents.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS pursue a serial rapist when a recent assault at a bakery is linked to two attacks at a chocolate factory ten years previously. However, Duncan Millers chocolate factory hides many dark secrets, and the team find themselves with more cases than they bargained for.

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: Jonathan and Maddy are having a hard time convincing the police that they arent involved in the murder of Felicity Vale. Matters arent helped by the fact that Maddy has been less than complimentary about the detective in charge of the case in one of her books. Jonathan begins to suspect that Kitty may not have witnessed a murder after all. Do the healing hands of Felicitys housemate Clare hold the answer?

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: When a wealthy baronet dies alone in his study the day before his wedding, Judith, Becks, and Suzie find themselves at the centre of another puzzling and complicated mystery.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: As the suspects alibis stack up, Judith, Becks, and Suzie are pushed to their limits. Will they be able to solve the puzzling murder of Sir Peter before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and the team discover more than one dead body, and a significant amount of family rivalry, in the manor home of a pair of ageing siblings.

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: As Chandler and Miles attend the christening of Miless daughter, a fox runs through the streets of Whitechapel with a human arm in its mouth. Later, more body parts from the same victim are washed up by the Thames, all containing evidence of a fatal poisoning. The only clue to the identity of the victim is a tattoo on the headless torso - can the team crack this gruesome case before the killer strikes again?

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: A murder in Oxford takes Lynley away from home and his wife Helen. Blackmail, bogus charities and a particularly nasty business operation are all uncovered beneath the respectable surface of a fashionable club.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS reinvestigate the disappearance of five-year-old Yasser Blackledge 25 years ago when a recently released prisoner, John Davies, confesses to his abduction and murder. The team are suspicious of Davies motives for the admission so soon after being granted parole, and far from treating it as an open and shut case they decide to take a closer look at Yassers estranged parents.

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Sister Boniface discovers the corpse of a housemaid at a local festival, putting a damper on Great Slaughters usual jovial feeling gatherings. The local police are forced to team up with the eccentric nun to find the culprit.

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Llewellyn has been forced to employ teachers over the summer as casual labour but even they cant help the fact that his farm is running at a massive deficit. With Boycies farm doing well, Llewellyn challenges him to a pub quiz in the hope of winning £5,000.

programme.title: Dont Wait Up
programme.desc: Comedy starring Nigel Havers and Tony Britton as father-and-son doctors, one an idealist NHS GP and the other a money-mad Harley Street consultant.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A new neighbour moves in upstairs, and his constant noise drives Lucy to distraction. She begs Lee and Tim to get him to stop, but neither is man enough. Tim takes being branded a coward to heart, and rushes off to join a boxing gym. Lee, meanwhile, tries to impress Lucy by confronting the man in his own flat, where he finds himself staring into the eyes of a cold killer.

programme.desc: Learning that their posh neighbours have an ancient claim over their land, Mike and Alison throw a swanky dinner party to help resolve the issue. With the ghosts their only guide to high-class decorum, the evening starts badly and only gets worse.

programme.desc: Del arms himself with red braces and yuppy sorts and goes forth to do battle. Unfortunately, his flirtation with the yuppie world doesnt seem to be as successful as Rodneys flirtation with the lovely Cassandra.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del Boy, complete with yuppie trimmings, Mercedes key ring, filofax and aluminium briefcase, gets involved in a shady business deal that blows up in his face.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del attempts to break into the big time when he sets up a consortium to buy 250 gold chains from a jewellery dealer at a knockdown price. Unfortunately, Del has not anticipated the dealer having a heart attack over lunch.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: The loveable Peckham boys go overseas after Del Boy enters one of Rodneys paintings in a competition and wins a weeks holiday in Mallorca for three, but when Del, Rodney and Cassandra arrive at the resort, Rodney realises there is a slight catch to Dels free holidaying plans.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Del decides to resolve a cash-flow crisis by charging people to attend seances conducted by Uncle Alberts psychic girlfriend. However, the enterprise somehow ends in hospital.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Rodney and Cassandra become officially engaged. However, Rodney thinks he has failed his computer science exam, and he has to find the cash for a deposit on a flat. Big brother Del tries to help him by selling a haul of mobile phones.

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses...
programme.desc: Raquel leaves Del, after he goes back to his bad old ways of gambling, drinking and staying out late. Meanwhile, Rodney is a shadow of his former self following Cassandras announcement that she wants to start a family.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a North Yorkshire-based, family-run historic car auction business, which uncovers some remarkably rare vehicles in Thornton-le-Dale. The Mathwesons attract all kinds of classic car buyers from all over the country.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rare and much-loved 1964 Ford Capri Consul coupe comes up for auction. Paul takes a 1957 Leyland Comet truck for a spin, and Dave admits that high on his wish-list is a Citroen 2CV.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Live
programme.desc: Highlights of a special event featuring an in-person auction. Derek and Dave aim to get the right price for a 1958 Jaguar XK 150, and theres a bidding war for a 1975 Yamaha Fizzy.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.desc: Derek brings a small army of military hardware to Thornton le Dale including a Studebaker Weasel tracked vehicle and a WWII-era Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Altered States
programme.desc: Louis travels to Portland, Oregon, the heart of a movement seeking to rewrite the rulebook on how we conduct intimate relationships and experience family life. Portland, whose city motto is `Keep Portland Weird, is seen as the US capital of polyamory and ethical non-monogamy, the practice of openly and transparently having multiple relationships that go further than just sex.

programme.title: The Supervet

programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team tries to get pop star Will Youngs two rescue dogs, and supermodel Yasmin Le Bons French bulldog and pug, well and home in time for the festivities.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats Caucasian shepherd dog Odin, who has wobblers syndrome. Toy poodle Monty needs a total hip replacement. And can Noel get malamute husky cross Maya back on her feet?

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: In this puppy special, Noel treats seven-month-old Border terrier Keira, and we look back at springer spaniel Poppy, who had some of the worst deformities Noel had ever seen.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: The nations favourite vet returns with more cutting-edge care. In this rescue special, we meet abandoned seven-week-old kitten Pretzel and look back at Wobble the whippet.

programme.desc: The West Midlands crews treat a pensioner whose heart rate is so erratic they are worried he might have a heart attack on the way to the hospital.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Altered States
programme.desc: Louis travels to Portland, Oregon, the heart of a movement seeking to rewrite the rulebook on how we conduct intimate relationships and experience family life. Portland, whose city motto is `Keep Portland Weird, is seen as the US capital of polyamory and ethical non-monogamy, the practice of openly and transparently having multiple relationships that go further than just sex.
